abilities.name: magma-armor
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be frozen. If a Pokémon is frozen and acquires this ability, it will immediately thaw out; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle. Overworld: If any Pokémon in the party has this ability, each egg in the party has its hatch counter decreased by 2 (rather than 1) each step cycle, making eggs hatch roughly twice as quickly. This effect does not stack if multiple Pokémon have this ability or Flame Body.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon’s hot magma coating prevents it from being frozen.

abilities.name: flame-body
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being burned. Overworld: If any Pokémon in the party has this ability, each egg in the party has its hatch counter decreased by 2 (rather than 1) each step cycle, making eggs hatch roughly twice as quickly. This effect does not stack if multiple Pokémon have this ability or Magma Armor.
abilities.flavorText: Contact with the Pokémon may burn the attacker.

abilities.name: weak-armor
abilities.shortEffect: Raises Speed and lowers Defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.
abilities.effect: Whenever a physical move hits this Pokémon, its Speed rises one stage and its Defense falls one stage. This ability triggers on every hit of a multiple-hit move.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's Defense stat is lowered when it takes damage from physical moves, but its Speed stat is sharply boosted.
